ground.schema:
Node properties:
User {betweenness: FLOAT, location: STRING, followers: INTEGER, following: INTEGER, profile_image_url: STRING, screen_name: STRING, name: STRING, url: STRING, statuses: INTEGER}
Me {profile_image_url: STRING, betweenness: FLOAT, following: INTEGER, url: STRING, location: STRING, followers: INTEGER, screen_name: STRING, name: STRING}
Tweet {created_at: DATE_TIME, id: INTEGER, id_str: STRING, text: STRING, favorites: INTEGER, import_method: STRING}
Hashtag {name: STRING}
Link {url: STRING}
Source {name: STRING}
Relationship properties:
SIMILAR_TO {score: FLOAT}
The relationships:
(:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:User)
(:User)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:Me)
(:User)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)
(:User)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(:User)
(:User)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(:User)
(:User)-[:SIMILAR_TO]->(:Me)
(:Me)-[:FOLLOWS]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:POSTS]->(:Tweet)
(:Me)-[:INTERACTS_WITH]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:RT_MENTIONS]->(:User)
(:Me)-[:AMPLIFIES]->(:User)
(:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:User)
(:Tweet)-[:MENTIONS]->(:Me)
(:Tweet)-[:USING]->(:Source)
(:Tweet)-[:TAGS]->(:Hashtag)
(:Tweet)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Link)
(:Tweet)-[:RETWEETS]->(:Tweet)
(:Tweet)-[:REPLY_TO]->(:Tweet)
ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (user:User {screen_name: 'TechExplorer'})-[r1:FOLLOWS]->(me:Me),
    p2 = (user)-[r2:POSTS]->(tweet:Tweet {created_at: '2024-01-10'})-[:USING]->(source:Source {name: 'TechChannel'}),
    p3 = (me)-[r3:SIMILAR_TO]->(similar_user:User {screen_name: 'DataAnalyst'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: How does the engagement pattern of *TechChannel* compare between *TechExplorer*’s tweets from January 10, 2024, and those of *DataAnalyst*, given their mutual follower networks?

cypher:
MATCH (techExplorer:User {screen_name: 'TechExplorer'})-[:POSTS]->(tweet1:Tweet)-[:USING]->(source1:Source {name: 'TechChannel'})
WHERE tweet1.created_at >= datetime('2024-01-10')
WITH techExplorer, tweet1, source1
MATCH (dataAnalyst:User {screen_name: 'DataAnalyst'})-[:POSTS]->(tweet2:Tweet)-[:USING]->(source2:Source {name: 'TechChannel'})
WHERE tweet2.created_at >= datetime('2024-01-10') AND (techExplorer)-[:FOLLOWS]->(dataAnalyst) OR (dataAnalyst)-[:FOLLOWS]->(techExplorer)
RETURN tweet1, tweet2, source1, source2
